name: keymap-fix
title: KeyMap Fix
description: Convert mis-typed text between Arabic, English, and French (AZERTY) keyboard layouts. One hotkey.
author: firas_latrach

commands.name: convert
commands.title: Convert Keyboard Layout
commands.description: Convert mis-typed text between layouts (AR ↔ EN, FR ↔ EN).

commands.name: convert-clipboard
commands.title: Convert Clipboard
commands.description: Convert the clipboard contents using the default direction.

preferences.name: defaultDirection
preferences.title: Default Direction
preferences.description: Direction used by the Convert Clipboard command.

preferences.name: azerty
preferences.title: AZERTY support
preferences.description: Enable French AZERTY conversion in the picker.
preferences.label: Show AZERTY direction options

preferences.name: toast
preferences.title: Notifications
preferences.description: Show a toast confirming the conversion direction.
preferences.label: Show toast after conversion
